product_results.title: Ailun 3Pack Privacy Screen Protector for iPhone 16 Pro [6.3 inch]+3Pack Camera Lens Protector,Dynamic Island Compatible,Anti Spy Tempered Glass[9H Hardness]- HD[6 Pack]

summary.text: Customers find this screen protector to be a very good product that is super easy to install and easy to put on the phone. However, durability presents concerns as the screen protector cracks in 2 weeks and shatters on the first very light fall. Users also experience issues with touch sensitivity, while opinions remain mixed regarding privacy, functionality, fit, and adhesion.

authors_reviews.title: Great Privacy Protection and Easy Installation
authors_reviews.text: Very good quality. The privacy screen works well and keeps the display hidden from side angles while staying clear when viewed straight on. Easy to install, fits perfectly on the iPhone, and the touch sensitivity is still smooth. Having a 3-pack is great value. Overall, very satisfied with this purchase.
authors_reviews.author: Sherrylee

authors_reviews.title: All in one protection
authors_reviews.text: I’m really impressed with this screen protector set! Not only does it include the main screen protector, but it also comes with camera lens covers, which is a huge bonus. Installation was super easy—everything I needed was in the box, including wipes, dust stickers, and a guide frame that helped me get a perfect fit with no bubbles.The screen protector itself is crystal clear and very responsive to touch. It doesn’t interfere with the screen quality or sensitivity at all. The fingerprint sensor works fine too.The camera lens protectors are an awesome addition. They fit perfectly over the lenses and don’t affect photo or video quality. I’ve taken several pictures in both bright light and low light, and I honestly can’t tell any difference compared to before. They also give peace of mind since the camera is one of the most vulnerable parts of the phone.Highly recommend this combo if you want full protection for your phone without having to buy separate items. Great value and quality!
authors_reviews.author: Krishna patel

authors_reviews.title: Pros and cons
authors_reviews.text: It’s okay. The screen protector itself was easy to put on with the guide. It didn’t get as dark when tilted away from you but it also doesn’t make the screen look super dark if you’re using your phone unlike other privacy screen protectors. It is on the thick side so when you’re trying to toggle with your apps to go to the next page it doesn’t go cause basically your finger loses touch with the screen and it’s literally just on the edge of the protector. If that doesn’t bother you then it should be good. The lens protectors are pretty bad in terms of lifting. It doesn’t fully go on no matter how much you press it on so you’ll see a lot of bubbles which is pretty annoying too. I haven’t dropped my phone yet so I can’t talk about how it actually protects from drops but for daily privacy use it’s okay.
authors_reviews.author: Stephanie
